0.5.0.description:
# Deadlockipelago 0.5.0 - Initial release
- Initial .apworld & client implementation publish
- Please see README.md for more info

If you experience any issues with this release, please @ bradexplodes in the AP Discord
0.5.0.title: Deadlockipelago 0.5.0

1.0.0.description:
# MacGuffin Goal & Street Brawl mode implementation
- Added "Collect X amount of Spirits" goal (MacGuffin item)
- Added new "mode" option (Standard or Street Brawl)
     - When Street Brawl is selected, removed unattainable checks (souls, sinners, etc.)
     - Added 11 new checks exclusive to Street Brawl mode
- Renamed "Ectoplasm" to "Spirits"
- Added customisation options for new goal & mode to the [player options creator site](https://archipelagobrad.github.io/deadlockipelago/index.html)
1.0.0.title: Deadlockipelago 1.0.0

1.1.0.description:
## Win with X Character Goal & "Hard Checks" toggle implementation
- Added a setting to exclude harder checks if desired (such as MVP/Key Player, high kills, assists, dmg, etc.)
- Added a warning when a multiworld is generated without using the player options creator site
- Added a new goal: With with X Character
   - Collect X amount of spirits (MacGuffin) to unlock said character, then get a win with that character to complete your goal.
- Spirits (MacGuffin) can no longer be excluded via excluded locations
1.1.0.title: Deadlockipelago 1.1.0

1.1.1.description:
# Bug fixes for save data and hero warning
- We now use the much more reliable AP room seed for storing our data on, rather than the room IP (which included the port - thanks to eaidan and mysticsquire for reporting)
- Amended the logic for the "You have no characters unlocked" warning when starting a game
1.1.1.title: Deadlockipelago 1.1.1

1.1.2.description:
# Fix for location/item rules and icon file adjustment
- Adjusted location/item rules to ensure that "Unlock X" items aren't locked behind their related "Win as X" locations as it caused generations to fail (thanks to palex00 for reporting)
- Amended method used to store the apworld icon (thanks to palex00 for reporting)
1.1.2.title: Deadlockipelago 1.1.2
